vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

verify.value: All required fields present and non-empty.
verify.rule: Ensure all specified fields are included and filled out.
Ensure the estimated mass does not exceed the allocated budget.

verify.value: All required features are mapped to specific geometry operations.
verify.rule: Each part_tree feature must correspond to a geometry operation.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Interfaces must be defined with matching details on both sides.

verify.value: Visible locking methods and preload intents are documented.
verify.rule: Critical joints must show locking mechanisms and preload information.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex bolt patterns.
risk.mit: Implement detailed assembly instructions and training for operators.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress on cooling inlet if airflow is obstructed.
risk.mit: Include airflow simulation tests during design phase.

risk.desc: Weak interface between motor pod and motor mount could lead to failure under load.
risk.mit: Conduct load testing and reinforce interface if necessary.

risk.desc: Insufficient support structure for wing spar reinforcement flange may cause structural issues.
risk.mit: Review and possibly increase the thickness of the reinforcement flange.

risk.desc: Potential for human error in accessing the equipment bay due to limited service access.
risk.mit: Design additional access points or improve existing ones.

verify.value: All features traceable from part_tree to geometry_ops.

verify.value: Interfaces named with exact neighboring subsystem labels.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex interface requirements.

risk.mit: Ensure sufficient clearance around service access points.
